idea.title: Merge Diner
idea.hook: Drag matching ingredients to merge them up into finished dishes, then serve hungry customers' orders before your counter jams.
idea.hook_ru: Перетаскивай одинаковые продукты, сливая их в готовые блюда, и подавай заказы голодных клиентов, пока твой прилавок не забит.
idea.prototype: Board merge-2: tap crates to dispense ingredients, merge identical items up themed dish chains, serve customer orders before the counter jams; new cuisine chain unlocks every ~90s.
idea.mutation_of: Merge Mansion / Gossip Harbor board-merge, reframed as a single-screen vanilla-JS 10-min loop with board-space (not energy-timer) pressure
idea.why_novel: Our 6th merge but our FIRST board merge-2 + order-fulfillment loop — distinct from our suika/merge-guns/merge-cleaners/merge-defense/merge-conquest games
idea.non_timer_pressure: board cell space — jam when board full and no legal merge
idea.lose_condition: board full + no legal merge for one frame -> GAMEOVER

sources.title: Gossip Harbor: Merge & Story (50M installs, tight clone cluster)
sources.snippet: Merge, restore and design while you solve a mystery — #2 grossing puzzle, the canonical merge-2+story loop.

sources.title: Flambé: Merge & Cook
sources.snippet: Merge ingredients, unlock recipes — food-themed board merge in the grossing chart.

sources.title: Tasty Travels: Merge Game
sources.snippet: Travel the culinary world merging items — food merge in both free and grossing casual charts.

sources.title: Merge Mercs: Tower Defense TD
sources.snippet: Merge appears across today's idle_tycoon CTR archetype on Yandex too.

synthesizer_brief: Pick the strongest buildable idea in a HIGH-retention-ceiling genre. Merge is our 100%-liked best-retained family AND today's #1 validated grossing cluster, but we lacked the board merge-2 + order-fulfillment sub-type. Build that as a cozy food/diner 10-min loop, board-space (non-timer) pressure, new cuisine chain every ~90s.

alternatives.title: Vertical Mining Tycoon
alternatives.hook: Dig down, sell ore, upgrade drill, descend into new ore tiers

alternatives.title: Idle Turret Upgrade
alternatives.hook: Auto-firing turret, drifting targets, stack upgrades, push zones

alternatives.title: Gate Runner Mob Multiplier
alternatives.hook: Steer a stream through ×2/+5 gates, grow your mob, crash the base
alternatives.why_novel: low-retention-ceiling reflex genre — North-Star steers away from it

alternatives.title: Arrows Escape
alternatives.hook: Slide arrows off the board without collisions
alternatives.why_novel: huge validated cluster but puzzle is our lowest-liked genre (30%)
